solution: ```class Solution:
    def minSteps(self, n: int) -> int:
        if n == 1:
            return 0
        res = 0
        d = 2
        while n > 1:
            while n % d == 0:
                res += d
                n //= d
            d += 1
        return res
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(sqrt(n))
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Decompose n into its prime factors; the sum of these factors equals the minimal operations. Each factor k represents one copy followed by k-1 pastes.
